full_text:
Wei Ping
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wei Ping. Urged Sima Yi to go onto the attack, failed to rescue Zhang He from Kongming’s ambush. Wei Ping was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
